description: Ensure public-facing components comply with NZ Web Accessibility Standard, WCAG 2.1 AA, and NZ Privacy Act 2020 data governance requirements.
oracle_notes: The Gradio HF Space (Track 36) is the primary public-facing interface. NZ government-adjacent projects must meet NZ Web Accessibility Standard 1.1 (aligned with WCAG 2.1 AA). Also, the corpus contains personally identifiable information (MP names, electorate data) which may trigger Privacy Act obligations.
